message:
fix(metrics): increase scanner buffer for large Firecracker metrics JSON

Firecracker metrics JSON can exceed the default 64KB bufio.Scanner buffer,
causing partial reads that fail JSON parsing. Increase buffer to 1MB.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
